title: Review the proposed field schema for x-auto draft post artifacts. Goal: validate a machine-readable format for 10 drafts grounded in sources. Expected considerations: status draft, posted false, no scheduled_for required if draft, title/text/body_ja/source_urls/reply_url/image_path/pillar/category/p...
summary_text: **Fail** Missing fields: - `draft_id` (inference): no stable per-row key for machine joins/dedup across 10 drafts. - `schema_version` (inference): no explicit versioning for forward-compatible parsing. - `source_assertions` (inference): `source_urls` alone does not encode which claim/body segment each source grounds. Risky fields: - `reply_url`: repo contract currently says a separate reply-specific URL field is not defined for `X Post Queue` ([docs/x-auto-note-linking-rule.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/x-auto-note-linking-rule.md#L22), [docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md#L27)). - `source_urls` naming/shape: guard skill references `source_url` while Notion field is `Source URLs`; alias mismatch risk unless normalized ([skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md#L53)). - `text` + `body_ja`: ambiguous mapping to runtime hub fields `Body` / `Body JA` unless one-to-one mapping is fixed ([docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md#L41)). - `pillar` / `category` / `pattern`: taxonomy drift risk without enum constraints (guardrail expects mix checks but no canonical enum in-repo) ([skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md#L104)).
